WITH region_sales AS (
    SELECT 
        wr.region_id,
        wr.name AS rep_name,
        SUM(wo.total_amt_usd) AS total_sales
    FROM web_sales_reps wr
    JOIN web_accounts wa ON wr.id = wa.sales_rep_id
    JOIN web_orders wo ON wa.id = wo.account_id
    GROUP BY wr.region_id, wr.name
),
max_sales_per_region AS (
    SELECT 
        region_id,
        MAX(total_sales) AS max_sales
    FROM region_sales
    GROUP BY region_id
),
